purpose: Hard evidence contract for news, injury, suspension, manager, rotation, tactical and task-state context.

timestamp_semantics.published_at_utc: Publisher/source original publication timestamp when independently available. Null when not available; never substitute a crawler observation timestamp.
timestamp_semantics.source_observed_at_utc: Timestamp at which an independent monitor/archive/index observed the source. For GDELT DOC JSON, seendate is stored here, not in published_at_utc.
timestamp_semantics.accessed_at_utc: Timestamp at which this project fetched the evidence.

provenance_classes.PROSPECTIVE_QUERY_TIME: Fetched and frozen before or at the active match freeze time.
provenance_classes.HISTORICAL_ORIGINAL_TIMESTAMP_VERIFIED: Retrieved later, but publisher/source original publication timestamp plus a reproducible immutable/archive version proves the content existed before freeze.
provenance_classes.HISTORICAL_INDEPENDENT_OBSERVATION_VERIF: Retrieved later, but an independent monitor/archive observed the exact URL/content before freeze. The monitor timestamp must be stored as source_observed_at_utc and must not be relabelled publisher publication time.
provenance_classes.RETROSPECTIVE_REFERENCE_ONLY: Neither publisher timestamp nor independent pre-freeze observation can prove the content state strongly enough for formal historical PIT use.

formal_prospective: if published_at_utc is present then published_at_utc <= freeze_at_utc
formal_historical_original_timestamp: published_at_utc is present and published_at_utc <= freeze_at_utc
immutable/archive evidence proves the pre-freeze version
formal_historical_independent_observatio: source_observed_at_utc is present and source_observed_at_utc <= freeze_at_utc
independent monitor/archive record identifies the same source URL or immutable content
content_sha256 is present when article body/content was independently frozen; otherwise discovery metadata may be used only as a context-discovery feature until source content is verified
retrospective_reference: must not mutate formal pre-match probability
must not be counted as a formal independent source

hard_rejections: source_observed_at_utc > freeze_at_utc when observation-time provenance is claimed
crawler/monitor seendate relabelled as publisher publication time
post-match article presented as pre-match context
content copied from another source and counted as an independent source
target-match final result, goals, cards, VAR or other in-match outcomes in a pre-match feature
predicted lineup relabelled as observed lineup
manual sentiment/probability assigned without an executable extraction algorithm

context_feature_policy.allowed_role: Structured residual features or predictability-gate features after source/time/identity validation.
